heading: Should I update the connection string if I change cloud provider on a Free or Flex cluster?
body:
If you have a [legacy connection string](atlas-faq-connstring-legacy) and you want to change cloud
providers, your connection string must include `.gcp` or `.azure`
and you want to do one of the following:

- Move to Google Cloud or Azure (Microsoft Azure)

- Move off of Google Cloud or Azure (Microsoft Azure)

  > **Note:** Either operation may change your connection string. In the
  > Atlas UI, click **Connect** on your cluster after
  > the upgrade completes for an updated connection string.
